name: Lucy Gordon
message:
"Hello team,

I was going through your website & I personally see a lot of potential in your website & business.

We can increase targeted traffic to your website so that it appears on Google's first page. Bing, Yahoo, AOL, etc.

Please provide your name, contact information, and email.

Well wishes,
Lucy Gordon"

name: Amy Stoto
message: I signed my son up for the non competitive wrestling in Wethersfield 2 weeks ago and have not received any confirmation. I just want to make sure he was enrolled. His name is Joseph Stoto
